---
name: Feature request
about: File a feature request to suggest new functionality or improvements for the project.
title: '[FEATURE]: '
labels: 'feature'

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] I have provided a clear and concise description of the feature request.
- [ ] I understand that submitting this feature request does not guarantee that it will be implemented.

**Problem**
Describe the problem or limitation that this feature request aims to resolve. Explain why the current behavior is insufficient or problematic.

**Use cases**
Describe how you would use this feature in practice.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

**Alternatives considered**
Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

**Priority**
How important is this feature to you? Choose one:

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical

**Additional context**
Any other context, references, screenshots, or mockups that would help explain the feature request.
